001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Delete;
006import androidx.room.Insert;
007import androidx.room.Query;
008import androidx.room.Transaction;
009import androidx.room.Update;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithEggGroups;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
013import java.util.List;
014
015/**
016 * Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Batch entity operations.
017 */
018@Dao
019public interface BatchDao {
020
021  /**
022   * Inserts a single batch into the database.
023   *
024   * @param batch the batch to insert
025   * @return the generated batch ID
026   */
027  @Insert
028  long insert(Batch batch);
029
030  /**
031   * Updates an existing batch in the database.
032   *
033   * @param batch the batch to update
034   */
035  @Update
036  void update(Batch batch);
037
038  /**
039   * Deletes a batch from the database.
040   *
041   * @param batch the batch to delete
042   */
043  @Delete
044  void delete(Batch batch);
045
046  /**
047   * Retrieves all batches ordered by date set (descending) as LiveData.
048   *
049   * @return a LiveData list of all batches
050   */
051  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch ORDER BY date_set DESC")
052  LiveData<List<Batch>> selectAll();
053
054  /**
055   * Retrieves a specific batch by ID as LiveData.
056   *
057   * @param id the ID of the batch to retrieve
058   * @return a LiveData containing the batch with the specified ID
059   */
060  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch WHERE batch_id = :id")
061  LiveData<Batch> select(long id);
062
063  /**
064   * Retrieves all batches for a specific incubator as LiveData.
065   *
066   * @param incubatorId the ID of the incubator
067   * @return a LiveData list of batches for the specified incubator
068   */
069  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch WHERE incubator_id = :incubatorId ORDER by date_set DESC")
070  LiveData<List<Batch>> selectByIncubator(long incubatorId);
071
072  /**
073   * Retrieves a specific batch with its associated egg groups as LiveData.
074   *
075   * @param id the ID of the batch to retrieve
076   * @return a LiveData containing the batch with its egg groups
077   */
078  @Transaction
079  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch WHERE batch_id = :id")
080  LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups> selectWithGroups(long id);
081
082  /**
083   * Retrieves all batches with their associated egg groups as LiveData.
084   *
085   * @return a LiveData list of all batches with their egg groups
086   */
087  @Transaction
088  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch ORDER BY date_set DESC")
089  LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>> selectAllWithGroups();
090
091  /**
092   * Retrieves all batches with incubator information as LiveData.
093   *
094   * @return a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details
095   */
096  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch_with_incubator")
097  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubator();
098
099  /**
100   * Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by expected hatch date (ascending).
101   *
102   * @return a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by hatch date
103   */
104  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch_with_incubator ORDER BY expected_hatch_date ASC")
105  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch();
106
107  /**
108   * Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by incubator name then date set.
109   *
110   * @return a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by name then date
111   */
112  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch_with_incubator ORDER BY incubator_name ASC, date_set DESC")
113  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator();
114
115  /**
116   * Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by batch number then date set.
117   *
118   * @return a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by batch number
119   */
120  @Query("SELECT * FROM batch_with_incubator ORDER BY batch_number IS NULL, batch_number ASC, date_set DESC")
121  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber();
122
123}
